features.name: left_associative_binary_operator_chain
features.description: Code should include a chain of binary AND operations with explicit left associativity grouping to test recursive pattern matching

features.name: right_associative_binary_operator_chain
features.description: Code should include a chain of binary OR operations with right-side flattening to test pattern reduction
features.snippet: assign Y = (A | B | C | D) | E;

features.name: nested_xor_operator_with_mixed_parenthesis
features.description: Code should include a chain of XOR operations with mixed associativity to test recursive pattern handling
features.snippet: assign Z = A ^ (B ^ C) ^ D ^ E;
